title: Tagine with Spring Vegetables
description: A flavorful and aromatic stew originating from North Africa, made with tender spring vegetables and rich Parmesan cheese.

ingredients.name: spring vegetables
ingredients.amount: 1 cup mixed (such as carrots, zucchini, bell peppers)

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large clay or ceramic tagine over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the mixed spring vegetables and cook until they start to tenderize, about 5 minutes.
Add the algerian spice mix, tagine spice mix, and broth. Stir to combine.
Bring the stew to a simmer, then reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, until the vegetables are tender, about 20 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese.
